lines.english: What makes trading between rich countries difficult?
lines.chinese: 什么使得富裕国家之间的贸易变得困难？
lines.raw: What makes trading between rich countries difficult? | 什么使得富裕国家之间的贸易变得困难？

lines.english: Chickens slaughtered in the United States, claim officials in Brussels, are not fit to grace European tables.
lines.chinese: 布鲁塞尔的官员声称，在美国宰杀的鸡不适合摆上欧洲餐桌。
lines.raw: Chickens slaughtered in the United States, claim officials in Brussels, are not fit to grace European tables. | 布鲁塞尔的官员声称，在美国宰杀的鸡不适合摆上欧洲餐桌。

lines.english: No, say the Americans: our fowl are fine, we simply clean them in a different way.
lines.chinese: 不，美国人说：我们的家禽很好，我们只是用不同的方式清洗它们。
lines.raw: No, say the Americans: our fowl are fine, we simply clean them in a different way. | 不，美国人说：我们的家禽很好，我们只是用不同的方式清洗它们。

lines.english: It is not just farmers who are complaining.
lines.raw: It is not just farmers who are complaining. | 抱怨的不仅仅是农民。

lines.english: An electric razor that meets the European Union's safety standards must be approved by American testers before it can be sold in the United States, and an American-made dialysis machine needs the EU's okay before it hits the market in Europe.
lines.chinese: 一款符合欧盟安全标准的电动剃须刀，在美国销售前必须通过美国测试员的批准；一台美国制造的透析机，在欧洲上市前需要得到欧盟的许可。
lines.raw: An electric razor that meets the European Union's safety standards must be approved by American testers before it can be sold in the United States, and an American-made dialysis machine needs the EU's okay before it hits the market in Europe. | 一款符合欧盟安全标准的电动剃须刀，在美国销售前必须通过美国测试员的批准；一台美国制造的透析机，在欧洲上市前需要得到欧盟的许可。

lines.english: As it happens, a razor that is safe in Europe is unlikely to electrocute Americans.
lines.chinese: 碰巧的是，在欧洲安全的剃须刀不太可能电死美国人。
lines.raw: As it happens, a razor that is safe in Europe is unlikely to electrocute Americans. | 碰巧的是，在欧洲安全的剃须刀不太可能电死美国人。

lines.english: So, ask businesses on both sides of the Atlantic, why have two lots of tests where one would do?
lines.chinese: 因此，大西洋两岸的企业都在问，为什么需要进行两套测试，而一套就足够了？
lines.raw: So, ask businesses on both sides of the Atlantic, why have two lots of tests where one would do? | 因此，大西洋两岸的企业都在问，为什么需要进行两套测试，而一套就足够了？

lines.english: Politicians agree, in principle, so America and the EU have been trying to reach a deal which would eliminate the need to double-test many products.
lines.chinese: 政治家们原则上同意这一点，因此美国和欧盟一直在努力达成一项协议，以消除许多产品重复测试的必要性。
lines.raw: Politicians agree, in principle, so America and the EU have been trying to reach a deal which would eliminate the need to double-test many products. | 政治家们原则上同意这一点，因此美国和欧盟一直在努力达成一项协议，以消除许多产品重复测试的必要性。

lines.english: They hope to finish in time for a trade summit between America and the EU on May 28th.
lines.chinese: 他们希望能在5月28日美国和欧盟贸易峰会前及时完成。
lines.raw: They hope to finish in time for a trade summit between America and the EU on May 28th. | 他们希望能在5月28日美国和欧盟贸易峰会前及时完成。

lines.english: Although negotiators are optimistic, the details are complex enough that they may be hard-pressed to get a deal at all.
lines.chinese: 尽管谈判代表持乐观态度，但细节足够复杂，他们可能很难达成协议。
lines.raw: Although negotiators are optimistic, the details are complex enough that they may be hard-pressed to get a deal at all. | 尽管谈判代表持乐观态度，但细节足够复杂，他们可能很难达成协议。

lines.english: Why? One difficulty is to construct the agreements.
lines.chinese: 为什么？一个困难是构建协议。
lines.raw: Why? One difficulty is to construct the agreements. | 为什么？一个困难是构建协议。

lines.english: The Americans would happily reach one accord on standards for medical devices and then hammer out different pacts covering, say, electronic goods and drug manufacturing.
lines.chinese: 美国人乐意先就医疗器械标准达成一项协议，然后再敲定涵盖电子产品和药品生产等不同协议。
lines.raw: The Americans would happily reach one accord on standards for medical devices and then hammer out different pacts covering, say, electronic goods and drug manufacturing. | 美国人乐意先就医疗器械标准达成一项协议，然后再敲定涵盖电子产品和药品生产等不同协议。

lines.english: The EU -- following fine continental traditions -- wants agreement on general principles,
lines.chinese: 欧盟——遵循优良的欧洲大陆传统——希望就普遍原则达成协议，
lines.raw: The EU -- following fine continental traditions -- wants agreement on general principles, | 欧盟——遵循优良的欧洲大陆传统——希望就普遍原则达成协议，

lines.english: which could be applied to many types of products and perhaps extended to other countries.
lines.chinese: 这些原则可以适用于多种类型的产品，并且可能扩展到其他国家。
lines.raw: which could be applied to many types of products and perhaps extended to other countries. | 这些原则可以适用于多种类型的产品，并且可能扩展到其他国家。

lines.english: These days, it is differences in national regulations, far more than tariffs, that put sand in the wheels of trade between rich countries.
lines.chinese: 如今，是各国法规的差异，而不是关税，阻碍了富裕国家之间的贸易。
lines.raw: These days, it is differences in national regulations, far more than tariffs, that put sand in the wheels of trade between rich countries. | 如今，是各国法规的差异，而不是关税，阻碍了富裕国家之间的贸易。
